page: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-1xCPU-4GB is an entry-level virtual server based on the KVM hypervisor. It features a single shared vCPU from an AMD EPYC 7542 processor running at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The configuration includes 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. No local storage or dedicated GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type.

Performance benchmarks indicate that this server is designed for lightweight workloads. The shared CPU allocation results in a stress-ng single-core and multi-core score of 737.38, placing it in the bottom 10% of tested instances. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with large-block read and write speeds measuring 9.03 GB/sec and 7.89 GB/sec respectively. While single-threaded bzip3 decompression achieves an average tier performance of 9.08 GB/sec, most other computational tests, including software compilation and database operations, fall into the lower performance tiers.

Given its shared hardware resources and modest performance profile, this server type represents a highly cost-efficient option for non-production environments. It is best suited for low-traffic web serving, basic text processing, lightweight caching, and development or testing environments where continuous high-performance CPU throughput is not required.
description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-1xCPU-4GB is a budget-friendly, entry-level virtual server featuring a single shared AMD EPYC 7542 vCPU clocked at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 4.0 GB of RAM. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results position this server in the lower performance tiers, with a stress-ng score of 737.38 and a PassMark database operations score of 506.18. It is qualitatively optimized for cost efficiency rather than raw performance, making it suitable for lightweight, non-critical workloads such as development environments, basic text processing, and low-traffic static web serving.
og_description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-1xCPU-4GB is a budget-friendly virtual server featuring 1 shared AMD EPYC vCPU, 4.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight workloads and development environments.

tagline: A budget-friendly, shared-CPU virtual server with four gigabytes of memory, designed for lightweight development and non-production workloads.
